Urinalysis cost in Philadelphia.

What urinalysis costs at 6 Philadelphia-area hospitals, pulled directly from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file. Cash-pay range: $20 to $250 (13× spread). CPT code 81002.

Pick your insurance plan, see what each Philadelphia-area hospital negotiated. Estimated out-of-pocket included.

Compare urinalysis prices →

Urinalysis, nationally.

The Philadelphia numbers above only tell part of the story. The same urinalysis can vary 10× across US metros, and even within Philadelphia the published prices span 13 times from cheapest to most expensive.

For the national comparison set, see the Urinalysis overview page, which covers urinalysis prices at every hospital in our dataset.

What to ask before you book.

Is this the all-in price? Hospitals often quote the facility fee and bill the radiologist, anesthesiologist, or specialist separately. Ask for the bundled total.

Cash-pay vs. insurance? Don't assume insurance is cheaper. For high-deductible plans, cash pay often beats the negotiated rate, especially for elective imaging.

Financial assistance? Federally-tax-exempt hospitals must have a financial-assistance policy. It can knock 50-100% off the bill for households below specific income thresholds.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
